problem: Musculoskeletal pain is a leading cause of disability and healthcare costs. Access to evidence-based multimodal treatment including physical therapy is limited, with long wait times and high costs.
solution: Digital-first MSK care platform delivering multimodal treatment (exercise therapy, education, mindfulness) through a mobile app. Programs developed by Doctors of Physical Therapy, with proven clinical outcomes across 11 trials and 3x ROI demonstrated in claims studies.
